title: hieracium ciliatum
intro: Hieracium ciliatum, also known as Mouse-ear Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium ciliatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on individual circumstances.
